keyword.title: Search Query (Suchbegriff)
keyword.description: The specific business category or name (e.g., 'IT-Beratung', 'Maschinenbau', 'Rechtsanwalt').

location.title: Location (Ort)
location.description: City or Zip Code in Germany (e.g., 'Berlin', 'München', 'Hamburg', '80331').

maxLeads.title: Maximum Leads
maxLeads.description: Maximum number of German business leads to extract.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Apify Residential Proxy (Germany targeted) is highly required.
